## Delegation of powers, duties, and functions

## Topics for delegation of powers, duties, and functions
- Delegation of ministerial powers, duties, and functions Persons authorized to exercise the powers and perform the duties of the Minister of National Revenue.
- Delegation of Commissioner's powers, duties, and functions Persons authorized to perform duties and functions of the Commissioner of Revenue.
